narrative:
Harmony Township has 1,891 registered voters, with 52.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.0 percentage points.
